articles.title: Why More People in Their 30s Are Suddenly Getting Colon Cancer - SciTechDaily
articles.description: A major Swiss study found that colorectal cancer is becoming increasingly common in adults under 50, even as rates decline in older age groups.
articles.content:
Colorectal cancer is rising in younger adults, and researchers still don’t fully understand why. Credit: Shutterstock
A major Swiss study found that colorectal cancer is becoming increasingly common… [+4906 chars]
